untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'historical analog model correlation to 1929 crash period (>0.75 correlation)' and 'macro policy surprise detection' — neither can be expressed using the allowed indicators list. Analog model correlation and macro regime shifts require external data sources and NLP/event detection beyond standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: Translated volume spike condition using vol_ratio_20 as proxy for extreme downside volume (>1.5× normal). Used close below sma_20 to approximate 'major market inflection.' Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. Exit uses volume reversion (vol_ratio <1.0) within 2-day hold window. The core analog correlation and macro event detection cannot be implemented with standard technical indicators.
